panels.description: The rate (requests per minute) of usage of each endpoint measured over a rolling 5 minute period.
panels.title: Rate of usage

panels.description: The number of requests to each endpoint in the selected time period
panels.title: Total usage

panels.description:
Estimated cost of search requests in the selected period.

This is a rough estimate based on approximate query count, and does not include fixed costs, data storage costs, and ancillary service costs (such as BigQuery).
panels.title: Cost
Search requests to Search API v2

panels.description: Percentage of unsuccessful requests to the searches controller.

targets.expr: sum by (controller) (increase(http_requests_total{job="search-api-v2", controller="searches", status!="200"}[$__range])) / sum by (controller) (increase(http_requests_total{job="search-api-v2", controller="searches"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Error rate

panels.description: 5 minute rolling success rate (200 response codes out of all requests) for search requests
panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: Total number of unsuccessful requests to the searches controller.
panels.title: Total errors
Autocomplete requests to Search API v2

panels.description: Maximum number of suggestions returned from Discovery Engine over the last hour relative to the end of the highlighted range.
panels.title: Max suggestions over last hour

panels.description: Maximum number of suggestions returned from Discovery Engine over the previous hour.
panels.title: Max suggestions

panels.description: Percentage of requests to Discovery Engine over the previous hour that return zero suggestions.
panels.title: Empty suggestion rate

panels.description: Percentage of requests to Discovery Engine over the highlighted range that return zero suggestions.
panels.title: Empty suggestion rate

panels.description: Total number of unsuccessful requests to the autocompletes controller. This does not include specific errors from Discovery Engine, which are handled internally.
panels.title: Unhandled errors

panels.description:
Time to serve search results from Search API v2 (HTTP response time)

Green = satisfied
Yellow = tolerating
Red = frustrated
panels.title: Search APIv2 latency: Search Requests

panels.description:
Time to serve autocomplete results from Search API v2 (HTTP response time)

Green = satisfied
Yellow = tolerating
Red = frustrated
panels.title: Search APIv2 latency: Autocomplete requests

panels.description: Duration of response from Google Cloud Discovery Engine (previously known as 'Vertex AI Search') to a search request (in seconds)
panels.title: Google Cloud Discovery Engine response times: Search

panels.description: Duration of response from Google Cloud Discovery Engine (previously known as 'Vertex AI Search') to an autocomplete request (in seconds)
panels.title: Google Cloud Discovery Engine response times: Autocomplete
Goal: Our users are provided high quality results
